name: Avenc de Fra Rafel
route_type: Predominantly horizontal (in the partial section described)
equipment: 3 ropes (1x70m, 2x30m), 1 sling, carabiners, 4 bolts (one for the anchor head if not using the natural rock bridge)
description: One of the most interesting, complex, and beautiful caves on Mallorca, reaching -145m depth. This description covers only the 'Pou Classic' zone, the least technically demanding section, though it still requires hanging over a 60m shaft. The magnitude rating reflects only this partial description of the cave.
full_description:
Description

We are before one of the most interesting, complex, and beautiful cavities on the island of Mallorca, although this description will only cover a part of the cavity, specifically the zone called "Pou Classic." This is possibly the least technically demanding zone, although one should not let one's guard down at any moment, as the visit to this zone of the cavity will require us to be suspended over a shaft of more than 60 m. If the aim is to know this pit in depth, the book "Mallorca Belleza en la Oscuridad" (Mallorca Beauty in the Darkness) describes the cavity magnificently.
